metadata.purpose: Reference sentences used as semantic anchors for sentence-level moral framing scoring
design_principles: News-style prose, not abstract psychology descriptions
Each sentence anchors clearly to one foundation
Mix of Philippine and general news contexts to avoid corpus overfit
Topical variety within each foundation to broaden the centroid
Preserves the original 13/foundation set from the prior iteration as a validated core
metadata.active_size_note: Set by 06_exemplar_stability_test.py. Pipeline samples this many exemplars per foundation with random_state=42 at runtime. Virtue/vice ratio is preserved during sampling.

care.definition: Concern for the suffering of others, including virtues of caring and compassion.

virtue: Families were devastated by the flooding that destroyed their homes and livelihoods.
Rescue teams rushed to evacuate trapped residents as floodwaters continued to rise.
Doctors worked through the night to treat injured survivors at the evacuation center.
The community rallied to provide food and shelter for displaced families.
Children in the evacuation center have not eaten in two days.
Volunteers distributed relief goods to victims of the earthquake.
The mother wept as she described losing everything in the fire.
Nurses comforted the children who arrived alone at the hospital after the disaster.
Strangers opened their homes to families separated by the flooding.
Aid workers fed and bathed the elderly survivors found in the collapsed building.
The teacher carried the youngest students one by one through the rising waters.
Volunteers cradled abandoned infants brought into the makeshift shelter.
Medical staff cared for the burn victims with constant tenderness through the night.
Neighbors searched the rubble for the missing family with their bare hands.
The young doctor stayed by the dying patient's side until her family arrived.
Caregivers fed and bathed the bedridden elderly residents abandoned by their families.
The shelter welcomed the abused mother and her children with warm meals and kindness.
Volunteers wrapped blankets around the shivering survivors pulled from the wreckage.
Rescuers risked their lives to bring trapped miners back to their families.
The pediatrician treated injured children without asking their parents for payment.
Counselors comforted the orphaned siblings in the days after the accident.
Strangers donated clothes and food to the families left homeless by the fire.
The hospice nurse held the patient's hand through her final hours.
Caregivers tended to the wounded animals brought in after the typhoon.
Volunteers cooked warm meals for the families standing vigil at the hospital.
vice: The victims suffered severe injuries from the explosion that rocked the marketplace.
Witnesses described the brutal attack that left three people dead.
Human rights groups documented cases of abuse and torture in detention facilities.
The death toll from the disaster continued to climb as rescuers found more bodies.
Survivors described the horrific conditions they endured during captivity.
Thousands of families remain homeless months after the devastating typhoon.
The wounded were rushed to the nearest hospital but many did not survive.
The young woman bore the marks of months of physical abuse by her captors.
Children were found malnourished and beaten in the squalid living quarters.
Witnesses described the cruelty inflicted on the prisoners in the secret cells.
The elderly couple was left to die without water or medicine in the abandoned home.
Victims of the assault suffered broken bones and severe internal injuries.
The infant was found neglected, starving, and covered in bruises in the dark room.
Survivors recounted being tortured for days before they managed to escape.
Workers were forced into hazardous conditions that left many crippled or dead.
The casualties included entire families wiped out by the indiscriminate shelling.
Investigators uncovered evidence of systematic cruelty in the labor camps.
The boy bore deep scars from years of beatings at the hands of his stepfather.
Aid workers reported widespread starvation among children caught in the war zone.
The patient died in agony after being denied basic painkillers by the prison clinic.
Victims of the chemical spill suffered burns, blindness, and respiratory failure.
The animal shelter rescued dozens of starving dogs from the abusive breeder.
Children watched in terror as soldiers burned their homes and crops to the ground.
The murdered family was found bound and gagged in their own home.
Witnesses said the victim begged for mercy before the attackers struck the final blow.

fairness.definition: Concern for justice, rights, and equal treatment, including proportionality and accountability.

virtue: The court ruled that the accused violated the constitutional rights of the plaintiffs.
The investigation uncovered widespread corruption and fraudulent transactions in the agency.
Workers demanded fair wages and equal treatment in the workplace.
Civil society groups pushed for reforms to address systemic inequality and discrimination.
The audit revealed that public funds were diverted to private accounts.
The whistleblower testified that officials had rigged the bidding process.
Indigenous communities filed a case saying their ancestral land rights were violated.
The judge ordered the immediate release of the prisoner held without due process.
Lawmakers introduced legislation guaranteeing equal pay for equal work across all sectors.
The supreme court affirmed that every citizen was entitled to a fair trial regardless of status.
The ombudsman launched an inquiry to ensure transparency in the contract award.
Activists pushed for a law guaranteeing equal access to education for all children.
The commission upheld the rights of the dismissed workers to due process and fair compensation.
Reformers demanded that public officials submit honest declarations of their assets.
The independent panel investigated the allegations to ensure justice for the victims.
The court awarded compensation to families wronged by the unlawful demolitions.
The watchdog agency exposed the bribery scheme to ensure accountability for the officials.
Lawmakers passed a measure protecting the equal rights of women in the workplace.
The prosecutor brought charges against officials accused of misappropriating relief funds.
The judge ordered a recount to ensure the election results reflected the true will of the voters.
Civil rights advocates secured a ruling that affirmed equal treatment under the law.
The commission upheld the right of every citizen to vote free of intimidation or fraud.
Auditors uncovered the truth about the missing funds and pressed for full accountability.
The journalist exposed the corruption ring, prompting indictments of the implicated officials.
The new law required every public contract to be awarded through transparent bidding.
vice: The accused were charged with plunder and graft for stealing billions in public money.
Minority groups reported systematic discrimination in access to government services.
The opposition alleged that election results were manipulated to favor the ruling party.
Human rights lawyers argued the law unfairly targeted the poorest communities.
The ombudsman found sufficient evidence of bribery among senior officials.
Investigators uncovered a scheme that defrauded thousands of investors of their savings.
The contractor was accused of cheating the government out of millions through padded billings.
Discrimination against ethnic minorities pervaded hiring practices at the agency.
The judge was indicted for accepting bribes to throw out cases against the wealthy.
Voters reported widespread vote-buying and intimidation during the local elections.
The official was charged with embezzling relief funds intended for typhoon victims.
Witnesses described how the commission rigged the bidding to favor friends of the chair.
Whistleblowers revealed that the agency systematically denied benefits to the poor.
The audit exposed a years-long pattern of fraudulent reimbursements by senior staff.
Investigators found that the company had cheated its workers out of overtime pay.
The lawsuit alleged the bank had systematically discriminated against minority loan applicants.
Officials were caught taking kickbacks in exchange for steering contracts to specific firms.
The corruption scandal cost taxpayers hundreds of millions in missing public funds.
Investigators alleged the senator had laundered the proceeds of bribes through shell companies.
The contractor cheated workers by underpaying wages and falsifying time records.
The unfair eviction left tenants with no legal recourse against the powerful landowner.
The official rigged the licensing system to extort payments from small business owners.
Investigators uncovered fraud in the program meant to benefit poor farmers.
The agency illegally diverted funds intended for public schools to private pockets.
Corruption charges were filed against officials who had pocketed disaster relief money.

loyalty.definition: Concern for in-group commitment, including loyalty to family, team, community, and nation.
loyalty.virtue_pole: Patriotism, group solidarity, fellowship, sacrifice for the collective.
loyalty.vice_pole: Betrayal, treason, abandonment, disloyalty to the group.

virtue: Communities across the country united to support the relief effort.
The crowd chanted the national anthem as the flag was raised at the ceremony.
The diaspora rallied to support their homeland during its difficult hour.
The soldiers vowed never to abandon their fellow countrymen on the battlefield.
Filipino expatriates organized fundraisers to rebuild villages devastated by the storm.
The town came together to defend its tradition against the outside developers.
Workers stood shoulder to shoulder with their colleagues during the long strike.
The town rallied behind its own residents during the long water crisis.
Comrades in arms vowed to stand together until the very last battle was won.
The captain refused to leave the sinking ship until every crew member was safe.
The teammates closed ranks behind their captain after the controversial loss.
Party members defended their leader against the corruption allegations leveled by rivals.
Union members refused to cross the picket line, standing in solidarity with the strikers.
Coalition partners reaffirmed their commitment to the alliance despite the policy disagreement.
Alumni rallied to support the school after the donor scandal threatened its funding.
The siblings stood by their elder brother through the long court battle.
The crew stuck with their captain even after the company tried to break up the team.
Cabinet members closed ranks around the embattled secretary during the hearings.
Loyal employees stayed at the firm through the bankruptcy proceedings.
The fraternity brothers shielded their friend from the accusations until the truth came out.
Allies of the senator pledged to back her re-election bid despite mounting criticism.
Members of the choir stood by their conductor when the church board tried to replace him.
The bandmates dedicated their album to their late drummer who had founded the group.
Teammates carried the injured player off the court, refusing to leave him behind.
The squad refused to play unless their suspended captain was reinstated to the lineup.
vice: The defector was accused of selling state secrets to a foreign government.
Critics called the move a betrayal of the people's trust and mandate.
The senator was branded a traitor for siding with foreign interests over the nation.
The split within the party threatened to divide the coalition permanently.
Allies turned against each other as the political crisis deepened.
The general was charged with treason after his secret deals with the enemy were exposed.
Loyalists denounced the official's defection to the rival party as a stab in the back.
Comrades felt betrayed when their leader abandoned the cause for personal gain.
The country expelled the diplomat caught spying on behalf of a foreign power.
Veterans condemned the politician who had betrayed the soldiers under his command.
Critics said the trade deal sold out the country's farmers to foreign agribusinesses.
The aide who had served the leader for decades suddenly switched sides for a paycheck.
Supporters were stunned when the senator abandoned the party he had helped to found.
Citizens denounced the official who sold the country's interests to foreign investors.
The whistleblower's relatives turned their backs on him after his disclosures.
Members of the opposition denounced the deal as a betrayal of national sovereignty.
The general was charged with siding with the rebels against his own troops.
Critics said the businessman had abandoned his workers when the company was sold off.
The community shunned the family that had collaborated with the occupying forces.
Allies broke ranks and publicly denounced the leader they had once loyally served.
Veterans declared the politician a traitor for backing policies that harmed soldiers.
The candidate switched parties hours before the election, betraying his loyal supporters.
Defectors handed over classified files to the enemy in exchange for safe passage.
The lawmaker was condemned by his own constituents as a sellout to foreign donors.
Members of the cabinet were accused of betraying the president to advance their own careers.

authority.definition: Concern for tradition, hierarchy, leadership, and respect for established institutions and authority.
authority.virtue_pole: Order, respect for leadership, duty, institutional governance, obedience.
authority.vice_pole: Subversion, rebellion, defiance of legitimate authority, disorder.

virtue: The president ordered the military to restore order in the affected provinces.
Officials assured residents that the situation is under control and agencies are responding.
The government imposed a curfew and deployed additional security forces to the area.
The agency issued new regulations requiring strict compliance from all operators.
The chief executive signed the order directing all departments to implement the policy.
Police and military personnel established checkpoints throughout the city.
The administration announced the appointment of a new cabinet secretary.
The department issued a memorandum directing all regional offices to comply immediately.
The committee convened to review the implementation of the new government mandate.
The general issued strict orders that all troops report to their commanding officers by dawn.
Citizens lined up patiently as the elder magistrate convened the local hearing.
Officials reaffirmed the chain of command in the wake of the recent restructuring.
The principal enforced the school rules without exception during the disciplinary hearing.
Workers complied with the supervisor's directives without question during the audit.
The bishop reminded the faithful of their duty to obey the teachings of the church.
The court directed all parties to follow its order without further delay.
Officers saluted as the chief of staff arrived to inspect the troops on parade.
The chief justice administered the oath of office with full institutional gravity.
Cadets stood at rigid attention as the commandant reviewed the morning formation.
The judge held the witness in contempt for failing to comply with the subpoena.
The mayor convened the council to implement the directive from the national government.
Police enforced the curfew strictly to maintain order throughout the city.
The commission issued binding rules requiring all licensees to follow strict protocols.
The general ordered an immediate review of compliance with the chain of command.
Officials underscored the importance of respecting institutional procedures during the transition.
vice: Thousands of demonstrators defied the rally ban and marched to the presidential palace.
The group openly challenged the authority of the national government.
Rebel fighters attacked a military outpost in the southern province.
Students staged a walkout to protest the administration's education policies.
The opposition vowed to resist the mandate they called unconstitutional.
Militant groups clashed with riot police outside the government building.
Workers ignored the management's return-to-office order and continued the strike.
Protesters defied the dispersal order and continued their march through the city.
Insurgents seized control of the police station after overwhelming the local garrison.
Demonstrators tore down the gates of the government compound in defiance of the curfew.
Rebellious troops mutinied against their commanders and seized control of the camp.
Citizens openly flouted the new law, refusing to comply with what they called an unjust mandate.
Activists chained themselves to the building to block officials from enforcing the eviction.
Students occupied the administration building to protest the new tuition policy.
Striking workers blockaded the factory entrance, defying the back-to-work order.
The faction split from the official party, refusing to recognize its leadership.
Rioters overturned police vehicles and clashed with security forces in the city center.
Protesters defied the court order and continued their occupation of the public square.
The militia openly challenged the legitimacy of the elected government.
Citizens shouted down the official at the public hearing, refusing to let him speak.
Insurgents ambushed the convoy in a brazen challenge to government control of the region.
Activists scaled the fence and unfurled banners denouncing the official ceremony.
Members of the assembly walked out in protest against the speaker's ruling.
Protesters refused to disperse despite repeated warnings from law enforcement.
Mutinous officers seized the radio station and broadcast their challenge to the leadership.

sanctity.definition: Concern for purity, sacredness, and the sense of moral degradation or elevation.
sanctity.virtue_pole: Purity, holiness, sacredness, moral elevation, reverence.
sanctity.vice_pole: Degradation, desecration, immorality, corruption of the sacred, contamination.

virtue: The church called on the faithful to pray for the nation during the crisis.
Thousands of devotees walked barefoot in the Holy Week procession.
Religious leaders blessed the community and urged spiritual renewal.
The cardinal described the act as a sacred duty to protect the innocent.
Worshippers gathered at dawn for the Easter sunrise service at the cathedral.
The bishop called for moral renewal and a return to traditional values.
Pilgrims traveled from across the country to visit the holy shrine.
The faithful renewed their baptismal vows during the solemn ceremony.
Monks led the dawn meditation in the centuries-old monastery on the hill.
Worshippers fasted and prayed throughout the holy season of Lent.
The community gathered to consecrate the new chapel built by their own hands.
Pilgrims knelt in reverence as the relic was carried in solemn procession.
The priest blessed the harvest in a sacred ritual passed down for generations.
Devotees lit candles at the shrine, offering prayers of thanksgiving and devotion.
The bishop urged the faithful to lead lives of moral purity and spiritual integrity.
Worshippers received the sacrament in silent reverence during the holy Mass.
The nuns dedicated their lives to prayer, service, and the pursuit of holiness.
Devotees observed strict fasting in preparation for the sacred feast day.
The cardinal led the faithful in prayers for moral renewal across the nation.
The community gathered in the cathedral for the consecration of the new altar.
Pilgrims observed silent vigils through the night in honor of the sacred occasion.
The priest blessed the children and called on the congregation to live virtuously.
Religious leaders called on the faithful to renew their commitment to sacred values.
Worshippers received ashes on their foreheads as a sign of repentance and renewal.
The bishop reminded the faithful that the sanctity of life must be honored from conception.
vice: Religious groups condemned the incident as a moral abomination.
The desecration of the church sparked outrage among the faithful.
The pastor condemned the act as sinful and a violation of everything the community holds sacred.
Religious leaders denounced the film as an obscene mockery of sacred beliefs.
Critics called the legislation a moral disgrace that defiled the institution of marriage.
The bishop condemned the scandal as a stain on the holiness of the priesthood.
Protesters denounced the act of vandalism that defiled the centuries-old shrine.
Critics called the practice an abomination that violated every standard of decency.
The cardinal denounced the trafficking ring as a depravity that shocked the conscience.
The priest condemned the gambling den as a den of vice destroying the community.
Critics called the desecration of the cemetery a grotesque violation of the sacred dead.
The bishop denounced the predatory abuse as a profound betrayal of sacred trust.
The cardinal called the abuse scandal a stain on the conscience of the entire church.
Devotees were horrified to find the sacred shrine had been vandalized overnight.
Vandals smashed the centuries-old altar and scrawled obscenities across the cathedral walls.
Worshippers wept as they discovered the holy relics had been stolen from the shrine overnight.
Pilgrims were horrified to find that thieves had defaced the icons inside the sanctuary.
Investigators uncovered that the priest had defiled the confessional by exploiting parishioners who came to him for spiritual guidance.
The community condemned the burning of religious texts as a sacrilege against generations of faith.
Devotees called the desecration of the patron saint's statue an unforgivable profanation of the village's holiest site.
The bishop denounced the cult leader who had blasphemed the sacraments by selling them for personal profit.
Critics condemned the corporation for desecrating the indigenous burial grounds with their construction equipment.
Pilgrims wept at the shrine that had been defiled by graffiti and broken liquor bottles strewn across the holy ground.
Residents recoiled in disgust at the contaminated water that had turned the once-sacred river into a putrid stream.
Activists denounced the squalid orphanage conditions as a degradation of the children's dignity that no community should tolerate.
